title: dough-modpack
description: A base modpack with common configs and mods used in the Polymerized Bakery modpacks and projects
body:
This modpack was created to solve an issue Xae and I had when creating our servers and modpacks. It serves as a "bootstrap" modpack for us to use that contains some QOL mods that dont step on the toes of any other mod we may need to use (atleast, shouldnt. there are edge cases!)

So this modpack is published to have a place to just store it that isnt volitile like a google drive!
